Provides CustomThemeData and ThemePresets required by AppDesign to supply dynamic color properties and generate the default fallback theme.
Provides ThemeEditorDialog, ThemePresetCard, and ColorDot components used extensively within the ThemeCustomizationSection.
Provides ThemeCustomizationProvider which holds the current user theme state read by AppDesign.
Provides the ThemeCustomizationProvider used by _CompactThemeSelector to read and update the app's theme mode.
Provides ThemeCustomizationProvider, handling theme state management, selection persistence, and JSON serialization/deserialization logic.
TrackingSection relies on BackgroundAppTracker to call checkInputMonitoringPermission() and openInputMonitoringSettings() for macOS permission flows.
Provides the AppUsageSummary model used to populate the AppRow UI.
The ApplicationLimitsCard calls `controller.updateAppLimit` on the ScreenTimeDataController to persist user configuration changes.
Provides ScreenTimeDataController which the main dashboard relies on to initialize, fetch getAllData(), and dispatch overall and per-app limit updates.
Supplies ApplicationsDataProvider, ApplicationBasicDetail, and ApplicationDetailedData models used to populate the deep analytics dialog.
Provides the `ApplicationBasicDetail` and `ApplicationDetailedData` models required for evaluating growth percentages and generating dynamic trend insights.
The parent view must supply the `List<dynamic>` data for `ApplicationLimitsList` and the title/value/color parameters for the `ProgressCard`.
The parent Overview dashboard must supply the raw List<dynamic> usage data to TopApplicationsList and CategoryBreakdownList.
The parent Overview dashboard must supply the raw string metrics (`totalScreenTime`, `totalProductiveTime`, `mostUsedApp`, `focusSessions`) to the StatsCards component.
Provides the AppUsageSummary model (or re-exports it) and likely aggregates data specifically tailored for the reports dashboard.
Supplies the AnalyticsSummary model required by TopBoxes to extract the high-level dashboard metrics (screen time, productive time, comparisons).
Provides FocusAnalyticsService used to persist completed Pomodoro phases to the database.
FocusModeAnalytics delegates raw session database queries to FocusAnalyticsService to compute aggregations and streaks.
Provides `NotificationController` which checks system-level notification permissions via `canSendNotifications` and `refreshPermissionStatus`.
Provides NotificationController to send alerts on timer phase changes and 1-minute warnings.
The export models are likely consumed by an overarching controller that handles file I/O and interaction with the Hive AppDataStore to map internal models to these exportable versions.
Provides `SettingsManager` to read app-level notification preferences and persist banner dismissal state locally.
Provides `SettingsManager` which supplies the current application version via `versionInfo['version']` to the ChangelogModal so it knows which GitHub release to fetch.
Exports TrackingModeOptions and ThemeOptions constants/enums used by the settings selectors.
Provides SettingsManager which the NotificationController relies on to retrieve user preferences regarding sound, reminder frequency, and allowed notification delivery methods.
Provides the SettingsManager singleton, which the ThemeCustomizationProvider uses to fetch ('theme.selected') and update the base theme mode setting, keeping it in sync with general app settings.
The parent Focus Mode view or its data controller must supply the `List<Map<String, dynamic>>` to the `SessionHistory` widget.
Exported by the resources barrel file to provide typography and text style constants for graph visualizations.
Provides SettingsProvider which supplies the appVersion map to the AboutSection.
Provides the SettingsProvider which exposes the critical clearData and resetSettings methods invoked by the DataSection.
The parent Settings view must instantiate FooterSection and provide the onContact, onReport, onFeedback, and onGithub callbacks to handle external link navigation.
Provides the SettingsProvider, which GeneralSection uses to read user preferences (language, voiceGender, launchAtStartupVar) and persist changes via updateSetting().
Provides the SettingsProvider which NotificationSection uses to read and persist notification preferences and reminder frequencies.
TrackingSection uses SettingsProvider to read and update tracking configurations like idleDetectionEnabled, idleTimeout, and advanced monitoring flags.
Provides AppRestart.restart() invoked by the RestartRequiredDialog to programmatically reboot the application after critical settings changes.
Manages the update lifecycle, exposing UpdateService, UpdateStatus, and UpdateInfo models consumed by the AboutSection.
